description: The full narrative or detailed description of a company event or news story.
The complete headline or summary text for a company event or news item.
All structured data fields and tags associated with a company event, including topics, codes, and attributes.
Code representing the second-tier subcategory of the event; must be decoded via overlay
Third-level event topic/category code (integer), for further sub-classification, must decode
Flag indicating if the news item was featured on a Reuters front-page story (1 = yes, 0 = no)
Binary indicator (1/0) for whether the event/news was featured on Reuters front page
Event importance level code: High, Medium, Low relevance to market (must decode)
Code representing the main category of the event; must be decoded via overlay (e.g. M&A, regulatory, etc.)
Level of importance for the development (1 = High, 2 = Medium, 3 = Low)
Main topic code or parent category of the development
Second-tier topic code linked (mapped) to the parent topic
